If you have any difficulty with this, or if you are buzzing 701 and no one is answering, please call the office at (917) 497-2760.



Jackie is on the 5th floor.



Once you are in the building, please take the elevator up to the 5th floor, Suite 507. We are requiring everyone to wear masks both in our waiting room and in sessions, and all therapists and admin staff will be doing the same. Thank you for your cooperation and understanding.
